ksa_text: Determine organizational compliance with privacy policies, data security standards, and regulatory requirements across all business units.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-T-006 (Security and Privacy/Task) scores 0.457 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.457) and is edge_case for the AI Product Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level AI Product Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, DDaT signal (0.457), and Security and Privacy handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Security/Privacy competencies for AI Product Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Privacy and data security competencies appear in 25-60% of AI Product Manager postings, especially in regulated industries (finance, healthcare, public sector).
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Security content is policy/org-level, not data implementation. Not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Security content is policy/org-level, not data implementation. Not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
